name: Nothing Phone 1
tagline: Experience the perfect blend of performance and customization with our Pixel-inspired custom ROM for your device.

steps.title: Unlock Bootloader
steps.description: Ensure your device's bootloader is unlocked before proceeding.

steps.title: Extract Boot & Vendor Boot
steps.description: Extract boot.img and vendor_boot.img from the ROM file.

steps.title: Install Platform Tools
steps.description: Download and install the latest Android Platform Tools on your PC.

steps.title: Open Command Window
steps.description: In the platform-tools folder, search for cmd and hit Enter (or Shift + Right Click → Open PowerShell Window).

steps.title: Connect Phone
steps.description: Connect your phone to the PC using a USB cable.

steps.title: Check ADB Connection
steps.description:
Verify device connection by typing:
adb devices

steps.title: Reboot to Bootloader
steps.description:
Enter Fastboot mode by typing:
adb reboot bootloader

steps.title: Check Fastboot Connection
steps.description:
Confirm Fastboot connection by typing:
fastboot devices

steps.title: Flash Boot
steps.description:
Flash the extracted boot image:
fastboot flash boot boot.img

steps.title: Flash Vendor Boot
steps.description:
Flash the extracted vendor boot image:
fastboot flash vendor_boot vendor_boot.img

steps.title: Reboot to Recovery
steps.description:
Enter recovery mode by typing:
fastboot reboot recovery

steps.title: Apply Update
steps.description: In recovery, click on Apply update from ADB.

steps.title: Sideload ROM
steps.description:
Install the ROM via sideload:
adb sideload Rom.zip

steps.title: Format Data
steps.description: After sideloading, perform a Format Data in recovery.

steps.title: Reboot System
steps.description: Reboot your device. The first boot may take a few minutes. Use the circle search to get started.

installationGuide.warning: Incorrect installation may brick your device. We are not responsible for any damage to your device. Proceed at your own risk.
